title: Sakura🌸
description: Sakura is a replacement for the current Cherry Trees in Minecraft 1.20. This pack aims to give the trees a more realistic look.
body:
# **Sakura**‎‎‎‎‎‎‎ Cherry ‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎Blossoms

This is the **Sakura** Minecraft texture pack. This pack aims to give you base 1.20 Cherry Trees a more realistic look, with more accurate textures that still match Minecraft's iconic look.


![sakura forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a926664b1f043c67ae6005ad0643362c902a6b8.jpeg)

**Sakura** changes the leaves of the trees into a deeper, redder pink, which gives them a more natural and simple look. The bark is also made darker and the wood inside is made a lot lighter than the current texture so that's easier to look at for the eyes. 

![wood, button, plates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a5a016f93ca626d23d7d0f4786dfc231ec4d792.jpeg)
ㅤ
With the addition of the new trees, all the items (like boats, doors, signs, etc.) also received a new texture to match the new color of the Sakura planks. The doors also received a new texture that makes them look like Japanese shoji doors.

![door, fence, stair, slab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aef655e77b95b09ea32cd378a65b2f03731bf9a.jpeg)
![all items in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04367f514798719296295c10a6503cbfcb7eef97.png)
